name: Dashboard Unpair — clicking Unpair clears session and returns to pairing screen

planSteps.description: Navigate to https://onenotify-7593c.web.app after setting window.localStorage.setItem('paired_mobile_uid', 'test_mobile_uid_device_101') so the Timeline Dashboard is active.
Click the 'Unpair' button in the top navigation bar.
The Timeline Dashboard view is removed, window.localStorage.getItem('paired_mobile_uid') is null, and the 'Pair Web Companion' card with a 6-digit pairing code is rendered once again.
